claims.summary: Recess and self-authored action should remain distinct from assigned instrumental work.
claims.disposition: Verified the existing protected-time, action-governance, and self-only agency boundaries.

claims.summary: Pressure, density, and resonance may conflict in ways that a single objective cannot represent.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded read-only fixture comparison that preserves each scalar and does not infer a felt score.

claims.summary: A ten-minute authority-budget audit could reveal whether apparent choice is being consumed by maintenance work.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline receipt audit only; no live authority budget may be spent or drained for the observation.

claims.summary: Resonance anchoring and divergence should be observed together rather than interpreted independently.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded replay using existing evidence-only fields, with no causal or control interpretation.
